novel_features.name: Agent-composable nested JSON via --select dotted paths
novel_features.description: Dotted-path selection through nested results.prices[], results.booking_urls, results.images[]. Returns only the fields the agent needs.
novel_features.rationale: Inherited from the framework's --select; the per-hotel feature is having a nested-enough response that selecting through it is worth the example.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use when you need only a couple of fields per hotel rather than the full nested response.

novel_features_built.name: Agent-composable nested JSON via --select dotted paths
novel_features_built.description: Dotted-path selection through nested results.prices[], results.booking_urls, results.images[]. Returns only the fields the agent needs.
novel_features_built.rationale: Inherited from the framework's --select; the per-hotel feature is having a nested-enough response that selecting through it is worth the example.
novel_features_built.why_it_matters: Use when you need only a couple of fields per hotel rather than the full nested response.

narrative.headline: Free Google Hotels CLI — per-hotel data with deep booking links, agent-native JSON, and local SQLite wishlist. No API key needed.
narrative.value_prop: Hotel-goat scrapes Google Hotels' server-rendered data (the same data the Google Hotels web UI shows) without an API key. v1 ships hotel search by location + dates with rich filters, single-property detail, and local wishlist. Brand-loyalty expansion, date-flex windows, price drift tracking, and per-OTA breakdown are deferred to v0.2.
narrative.auth_narrative: No authentication required. Google Hotels SSR is publicly accessible. Set `Accept-Language` via the system locale; pass `--currency EUR` to get pricing in another currency.

quickstart.comment: Headline search: location + dates + filters. Returns booking URLs per result.
Property detail by Google's property_token from a search result.
Save properties locally for later reference.
Confirm network reachability to Google Hotels.

troubleshoots.symptom: Empty results array on a query that returns hotels in the Google Hotels web UI.
troubleshoots.fix: Set --currency to match your locale (e.g. --currency EUR for European cities) — Google Hotels region-shifts inventory by currency. If still empty, run with --no-cache.

troubleshoots.symptom: HTTP 429 or 403 from Google after rapid back-to-back calls.
troubleshoots.fix: Lower request rate with --rate-limit 0.5 (one request every two seconds), or run from a fresh IP. The scrape uses no anti-bot rotation by design.

troubleshoots.symptom: Brand filter --brand Hyatt misses Andaz / Thompson / Park Hyatt properties.
troubleshoots.fix: Use brand-loyal --program hyatt instead — it expands to all sub-brands via the local brand_aliases table.

troubleshoots.symptom: drift returns 'no snapshots' for a property you've searched before.
troubleshoots.fix: drift keys on property_token, not display name. Run hotel-goat-pp-cli resolve "<name>" to get the token, then drift <token>.

troubleshoots.symptom: Total cost looks wrong for a multi-room family search.
troubleshoots.fix: The hotels command shows per-room price by default. Use the family command instead — it sums across rooms and surfaces the true family budget.

narrative.when_to_use: Reach for hotel-goat whenever a user needs to search hotels by location and date range or save properties to a local wishlist. Pair it with flight-goat when composing an itinerary; both share the same flag and envelope shape so a future travel-pp-cli orchestrator is a thin merge layer. Skip it when the user wants to actually book (Google Hotels is metasearch — hotel-goat surfaces the OTA deep-link, then the user books on the OTA).

recipes.title: Filtered search with European currency
recipes.explanation: Premium 4-5 star hotels in Paris under €300/night, sorted cheapest.

recipes.title: Agent-friendly nested-field selection
recipes.explanation: Returns only the four fields the agent needs, not the full per-result payload.

recipes.title: Property detail by token
recipes.explanation: Full property details (amenities, nearby places, full image gallery) from a property_token returned by the search.

recipes.title: Save and recall properties
recipes.command: hotel-goat-pp-cli wishlist add <property-token> && hotel-goat-pp-cli wishlist list
recipes.explanation: Local-SQLite wishlist: save properties from searches, list them later.

recipes.title: Health check
recipes.explanation: Confirms network reachability to Google Hotels and that the parser still finds AF_initDataCallback blobs.
